arts.ttl: Oldham Athletic v Southend United: National League playoff final – live
arts.sum: Live playoff final updates from 3pm BST Oldham preview | Southend preview You can email Emillia with your thoughts As always, I want to hear from you! Where are you watching/reading from? Are you on your way to Wembley? And who are you backing to win this afternoon? Feel free to send me an email. For Southend United, the last four years have been filled with torment and turbulence. Until last summer, the club came dangerously close to collapsing altogether amid what felt like never-ending takeover talk. But in July, under-fire owner Ron Martin finally sold the club to a consortium led by Australian businessman Justin Rees. Now, 11 months later, Southend are finally on the verge of a return to the Football League. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Preview: Oldham Athletic vs. Southend United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's National League clash between Oldham Athletic and Southend United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
